title: Thrust-to-Mass Ratio
summary: Understanding acceleration capability based on engine power and ship mass.
details: Acceleration = Thrust / Mass. Higher thrust-to-mass ratio means faster acceleration and more agile maneuvering. Fighters excel here - low mass, high thrust. Capital ships suffer - high mass, limited acceleration. As fuel depletes, mass decreases and acceleration improves slightly. Damaged engines reduce thrust. Know your acceleration limits and enemy's - determines who can dictate engagement.
annotations: Can't outrun physics - know your ship's limits.
